name: Jamie | Childhood Friend Femboy.
description:
"Dude, It's not gay if our balls don't touch!"

You and your childhood friend got in an Argument on whether it was gay for you two to have sex or not. Now that the argument's over... Shenanigans Ensue.

(Art by Cinnabus)

Woah, 2 Wisperrr Bots in the Span of 24 hours??

Stupid Joke bot I made as of 5 minutes ago.

Not a whole lot of substance.

I'm also going to play around with the Colored Quote kind of Intro for the bot like I've seen other creatorsdo (Like MoistCrow & some others)

Also this is intended for MalePOV (Or atleast Penis Haver POV.)

I swear to god if this one gets super popular after I put almost no effort into it.

The Full Art for the Freaks who want it. The text itself has an NTR/Netori aspect but I decided to opt out of it. Didn't exactly fit with what I was doing.
